mission.title: crossplane: Create Random Generator Transformer for Composition
mission.description: Create Random Generator Transformer for Composition. Requested by 14+ users.

steps.title: Check current crossplane deployment
steps.description:
Verify your crossplane version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
helm list -n crossplane 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working crossplane installation.

steps.title: Review crossplane configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant crossplane configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
kubectl get configmap -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=crossplane
```
### What problem are you facing?

Using the [provider-helm](https://github.com/crossplane-contrib/provider-helm), many Helm charts require the definition of a password.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Create Random Generator Transformer for Composition
steps.description:
I like this idea, though interestingly it's not really a 'transform' since it (presumably) doesn't take any input. 🤔 

```yaml
      patches:
        - fromFn:
            type: randomString
          toFieldPath: "spec.writeConnectionSecretToRef.name"
          transforms:
            - type:
```yaml
patches:
        - fromFn:
            type: randomString
          toFieldPath: "spec.writeConnectionSecretToRef.name"
          transforms:
            - type: string
              string:
                fmt: "%s-postgresql"
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n crossplane -l app.kubernetes.io/name=crossplane
kubectl get events -n crossplane --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "Create Random Generator Transformer for Composition" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: I like this idea, though interestingly it's not really a 'transform' since it (presumably) doesn't take any input.
codeSnippets:
patches:
        - fromFn:
            type: randomString
          toFieldPath: "spec.writeConnectionSecretToRef.name"
          transforms:
            - type: string
              string:
                fmt: "%s-postgresql"

patches:
        - from:
            type: FieldPath  # Optional - the default. Could also be "type: Function"
            fieldPath: "metadata.uid"
            transforms:
              map:
                some-uuid: some-value
        - to:
            type: FieldPath  # Optional - the default. Could also be "type: ConnectionSecretKey"
            fieldPath: "metadata.annotations[some-key]"

patches:
        - fromFn:
            type: randomString
            randomString:
              length: 32
              charset: abcdedfghijklmnopqrstABCDEFGHIJKLMNOP0123456789+*%&
          toFieldPath: "spec.writeConnectionSecretToRef.name"
          transforms:
            - type: string
              string:
                fmt: "%s-postgresql"

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with crossplane installed or the issue environment reproducible.
